programme.title: JillianTubeHD
programme.desc: Join YouTube star, JillianTubeHD, as she makes everything from delicious desserts to gold, glittery slime!

programme.title: Toys and Colors
programme.desc: Toys and Colors teaches kids life skills, letters, numbers, and more – all in a fun and family-friendly way!

programme.title: Wild Cherry
programme.desc: A virginal high school senior decides to get revenge on her jock boyfriend when she discovers he's only dating her in hopes that she'll end up in his team's "bang book."

programme.title: Brighton
programme.desc: Derek, Dinah, Dave and Doreen are two retired couples, who return to the seaside resort of Brighton after an absence of 40 years in an uproarious attempt to relive their youth. Flashbacks reveal teenage Derek and Dave as a couple of cockney chancers out to pull as many girls as they can, and Dinah and Doreen down from London and enjoying independence for the very first time in their lives. A chance meeting on their return to the seaside will bring up old rivalries and tensions and lead to a hilarious clash between the old world and the new.

programme.title: Flirting With Love
programme.desc: Two male actors/close friends want to jumpstart their careers. They end up making a big shot producer think that they have a hot script that everyone wants to get their hands on. The 2 men then drive to upstate New York and hole up in a family member's country home- with 10 dedicated days to write said script. Dominic and Raphael then get derailed by a beautiful gardener, Ava and Dominic's sister, Gigi. Both women appear at the house, which was supposed to be serene enough to focus on the task at hand. But to add to the problems, Gigi's boyfriend Wayne arrives, still suffering from PTSD, and his brother Devon as well, creating even more havoc.

programme.title: Chloe & Theo
programme.desc: Chloe, a young woman who has been searching for something to believe in, is living on the streets of New York City. She comes face to face with an Inuit Eskimo named Theo, who was sent By his elders to send a message to humankind.

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: Billy (Vince Vaughn) and Nick (Owen Wilson) are salesmen whose careers have been torpedoed by the digital world. Trying to prove they are not obsolete, they defy the odds by talking their way into a coveted internship at Google, along with a battalion of brilliant college students. But gaining entrance to this utopia is only half the battle. Now they must compete with a group of the nation's most elite, tech-savvy geniuses to prove that necessity really is the mother of re-invention.

programme.title: Henry V
programme.desc: King Henry V of England is insulted by the King of France. As a result, he leads his army into battle against France. Along the way, the young king must struggle with the sinking morale of his troops and his own inner doubts. The war culminates at the bloody Battle of Agincourt.

programme.title: Upside Down (2012)
programme.desc: Ever since Adam (Jim Sturgess) and Eden (Kirsten Dunst) fell in love as teens, their bond has faced astronomical odds. The pair are separated, not just by social class or the political system committed to keeping them apart, but also by a freak planetary condition: they live on twinned, parallel worlds with opposing gravitational forces. Years later, after suffering the pain of being torn apart, Adam decides to set out on a quest to once again find Eden and reconnect with his lost love.

programme.title: Continuum
programme.desc: After the disappearance of a young scientist on a business trip, his son and wife struggle to cope, only to make a bizarre discovery years later - one that may bring him home.

programme.title: Cold Brook
programme.desc: One fateful evening, after working late hours at the museum, two maintenance workers see a man standing silently near a Civil War exhibit. Despite chasing him away, each night he returns. Soon Ted and George learn that no one else can see the mysterious figure dressed in centuries-old clothing his name is Gil Le Doux and he's searching for a way home.

programme.title: Samson
programme.desc: Samson is based on the powerful, biblical epic of a champion chosen by God to deliver Israel. His supernatural strength and impulsive decisions quickly pit him against the oppressive Philistine empire. Feat: Taylor James, Billy Zane & Rutger Hauer.

programme.title: Dead Heat
programme.desc: In this offbeat comedy thriller, Roger Mortis is a good cop who will do anything to nail the bad guys, even if he's got to die for it.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: The Dark Horse
programme.desc: The Dark Horse is an inspiring true story based on the life of a charismatic, brilliant but little-known New Zealand Hero and Chess champion - Genesis Potini. The Dark Horse is a provocative, emotionally-charged drama about a man who searches for the courage to lead, despite his own adversities - finding purpose and hope in passing on his gift to the children in his community.

programme.title: Pressed
programme.desc: Two joyriders Jesse and Sam discover something hidden in the back seat of the car that could change their lives forever. Brian, unknown to Jesse and Sam, is desperately trying to seek a "quick fix" business deal that will put him back on top financially after being let go from his executive position at one of the top investment firms. Brian decides to go "all in", investing the rest of his savings into a short-term drug deal. After Jesse and Sam intercept the illicit drug money, they soon learn that they've stolen from the wrong people. A twisted tale of greed, deceit, murder and wealth, PRESSED is an action-drama feature where three relationships collide. It changes lives, some of them for good.

programme.title: The Expatriate
programme.desc: Far from home, far from safe, far from over.

programme.title: Last Shot
programme.desc: A young man is released from prison with a chance to turn his life around. But the streets haven't changed since he left and the same hate, regret, and fear waits for him on the other side of the wall. Can he ever really be free?

programme.title: Scents and Sensibility
programme.desc: In this modern adaptation of Jane Austen's Sense and Sensibility, Elinor and Marianne find themselves penniless after their father's fortune is taken away. As they look for ways to pay the bills, they encounter people who judge them and try to keep them down in the dumps. Add falling in love into the mix, and determining whom to trust becomes a mine field. Can the sisters find a balance between relying on their hearts and using good sense without losing everything they hold dear?

programme.title: Love Finds You in Sugarcreek
programme.desc: A father and son fleeing a shocking and brutal tragedy settle in the predominantly Amish town of Sugarcreek, Ohio. They are taken in by three sisters who offer the father work as a handyman, but a local policewoman begins to become suspicious of his past.

programme.title: Ruling of the Heart
programme.desc: Judge Morgan has become known for his no-nonsense toughness in court. He rules fast and he rules hard, barely noticing the person on the other end of his decisions. When he gets stuck in a cafe during a snowstorm, he is surprised to discover two of the other customers stranded with him happen to be people recently in his court, with verdicts handed down that have made him very unpopular. As the night unfolds in the small cafe, unexpected truth emerges from both sides that changes everything.

programme.title: All For Love
programme.desc: Jaded romance novelist Jo Payden has a tight deadline for her latest novel. Her last novel wasn't a big success so when her editor Diana recommends teaming up Colin, a Navy SEAL who also happens to be her brother, she jumps at the opportunity. Jo's enthusiasm quickly turns to dread as she realizes that Colin has signed her up for his Navy SEAL training Boot Camp.

programme.title: Killer Goodbye
programme.desc: A young man goes back to his hometown ten years after killing the killer of his parents. Once there he is asked to help the sheriff.

programme.title: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: A trio of American adventurers stranded in rural Mexico are recruited by a beautiful woman to rescue her husband, who is trapped in a cave in Apache territory.

programme.title: Colorado Sundown
programme.desc: Rancher helps a friend claim a spread he's inherited, only to get involved in his murder.

programme.title: Gunfighters Die Harder
programme.desc: Crooked bankers plan an insurance swindle and hire a Mexican gang to steal the bank's gold but they also pay Lasky's gang to kill the Mexicans.

programme.title: Border Shootout
programme.desc: Young rancher Kirby Frye is appointed deputy in a small town tyrannized by ruthless Phil Sundeen, the son of one of the founders of the town.

programme.title: Cinderella Pact
programme.desc: Nola, Deb, and Nancy are best friends who create a Cinderella Pact—a weight loss agreement using advice from "fairy godmother" newspaper columnist Bel.

programme.title: Wicker Park
programme.desc: A young Chicago advertising executive believes a woman he sees in a café is his long-lost love. His belief leads to obsession, as he puts his life on hold in order to trail her. Starring: Josh Hartnett, Diane Kruger, Matthew Lillard, Rose Byrne

programme.title: A Rainy Day In New York
programme.desc: Woody Allen returns to the romantic fields of previous hits Vicky Cristina Barcelona and Midnight in Paris.

programme.title: 30 Days until Im Famous
programme.desc: A Latina working in Los Angeles as a messenger is randomly discovered and fashioned into a pop music star.

programme.title: Prospect
programme.desc: A teenage girl and her father travel to a remote alien moon, aiming to strike it rich. They've secured a contract to harvest a large deposit of the elusive gems hidden in the depths of the moon's toxic forest. But there are others roving the wilderness and the job quickly devolves into a fight to survive.

programme.title: Forever in My Heart
programme.desc: Jenna and Charlie found love in Ireland but their dreams drove them apart. Five years later, they reunite and Jenna has to decide where her heart belongs - back home or in the Emerald Isle?

programme.title: Miss Virginia
programme.desc: An inspiring, heart-warming and extremely relevant true story. When Virginia Walden, an impoverished single mother, is losing her fifteen-year-old son to the rough streets of Washington D.C. she launches a movement to change the system that is responsible in a bid to save his future - and that of thousands like him.

programme.title: Cooking with Love
programme.desc: Hardworking and optimistic television producer, Kelly, doesn't have time for love. Along with her mentor Amanda, Kelly dives into another season of the Little Gourmet, a kids cooking show, when hot-headed Chef Stephen is dropped into Kelly's life as a last minute replacement host. As the two struggle to make peace and a successful show, they realize they have a lot more in common than they thought - a love of food, the kids they encounter and each other.

programme.title: They Made Me a Criminal
programme.desc: A boxer flees believing he has comitted a murder while he was drunk.

programme.title: Throne of Blood
programme.desc: A war-hardened general, egged on by his ambitious wife, works to fulfill a prophecy that he would become lord of Spider's Web Castle.

programme.title: Till The Clouds Roll By
programme.desc: Biography of songwriter and Broadway pioneer, Jerome Kern (Robert Walker). Unable to find immediate success in the U.S., Kern sought recognition abroad. He journeyed to England where his dreams of success became real and where he met his future wife Eva Leale.

programme.title: Tokyo Story
programme.desc: An old couple visit their children and grandchildren in the city but the children have little time for them.

programme.title: Beyond the Law
programme.desc: A former mobster turned businessman and a police detective must contend with a dirty ex-cop looking to bring the killer of his son to justice.

programme.title: Bless The Child
programme.desc: Cody, a little girl abandoned by her mother and raised by her aunt, a nurse, is kidnapped. The girl's guardian, aided by an F.B.I. agent, learn that Cody has supernatural abilities. Feat: Kim Basinger, Jimmy Smits & Rufus Sewell.

programme.title: Legendary
programme.desc: Cal Chetley is a bright, engaging, undersized fifteen year-old who's been picked on most of his life. Cal joins his high school wrestling team in the hopes his brother will train him. More importantly, Cal uses wrestling as the tool to reunite his family.

programme.title: Black or White
programme.desc: A heart-wrenching drama starring Academy Award Winners Octavia Spencer and Kevin Costner. When Elliot is left to care for his granddaughter Eloise by himself, Eloise's paternal grandmother seeks custody, drawing them into a long and uncertain battle.

programme.title: Risen
programme.desc: Lauren, an exobiologist, tracked by Homeland security, is called in to find answers for this unearthly event. She reluctantly gets involved in the effort to solve the ensuing crisis. Meanwhile, a gigantic tree, an other-worldly object has grown at the site of the meteorite impact. It becomes apparent, once was speculated to be a meteorite is in fact an experimental seed sent to Earth in their search for a new home. The seed is sent from a dying world, a desperate world in order to grow their trees to create a habitable environment for themselves on Earth and then colonize.

programme.title: The Colony
programme.desc: Set in the distant future, a female astronaut, shipwrecked on the long-decimated Earth, must decide the fate of the wasteland's remaining populace.

programme.title: Breaking Infinity
programme.desc: Breaking Infinity is a time-bending thriller about a research scientist named Liam, who has become unstuck in time. The only people Liam can count on for help are the doctor treating him, Emma, who's convinced he's suffering from delusions and his lab assistant Garret. As Liam's episodes become more intense, and his jumps through time more extreme, Liam travels from the distant past where he's guided by a mysterious Old Man, to the future where he witnesses the end of the world - an apocalypse he may have caused.

programme.title: Time Loop
programme.desc: A young Londoner scientist running experiments with his father in a quite Italian village, has to face the consequences of choices he hasn't made yet.

programme.title: My Zoe
programme.desc: Prepare for one of the most emotionally-engaging film of the year. My Zoe is a heartbreaking family drama with a dystopian science fiction twist starring Julie Delpy (Before Sunrise), Richard Armitage (The Hobbit franchise, The Stranger), Gemma Arterton (Summerland) and Daniel Brühl (Captain America: Civil War). Isabelle (Julie Delpy) is a divorcee recovering from a toxic marriage but still forced into contact with her ex (Richard Armitage) because they are co-parenting their daughter Zoe. When tragedy strikes this fractured family, Isabelle - a top-level scientist - takes matters into her own hands an unexpected and shocking way."

programme.title: WWJD II The Woodcarver
programme.desc: A troubled youth vandalizes a church and winds up in a close association with the woodcarver whose work he destroyed.

programme.title: Fatal Defense
programme.desc: A single mother signs up for self-defense classes from a handsome instructor. But he develops a frightening obsession with her and orchestrates an increasing deadly array of "tests" to see if she has truly learned from his lessons.

programme.title: Love You to Death
programme.desc: A prosecutor must work on a case which reminds her of her childhood, when her mother was killed by her alcoholic father.

programme.title: Sweetheart Con
programme.desc: Heartbroken over her parents' breakup and recovering from a car accident, Jane becomes increasingly suspicious of her mother's charming new boyfriend.

programme.title: Smart People
programme.desc: A widowed professor (Dennis Quaid) experiences a new love and an unexpected visit from his adopted brother.

programme.title: Love & Other Drugs
programme.desc: Anne Hathaway portrays Maggie, an alluring free spirit who won't let anyone — or anything — tie her down. She meets her match in Jamie (Jake Gyllenhaal), whose relentless and nearly infallible charm serve him well with the ladies and in the cutthroat world of pharmaceutical sales. Maggie and Jamie's evolving relationship takes them both by surprise, as they find themselves under the influence of the ultimate drug: love.

programme.title: The Wedding Fix
programme.desc: Reeling from a break-up, professional over-planner Gwen pitches in to help put the finishing touches on her best friend's wedding. But when she's teamed up with best man Josh, a free-spirited nature guide, she finds that pulling together this wedding might not be as easy as she thought.

programme.title: The Way We Weren't
programme.desc: When Charlotte and Brandon meet, they rush into marriage after failing in previous relationships. Then they discover who they've vowed to spend the rest of their lives with for better or worse.

programme.title: Operation Valkyrie
programme.desc: Conspirators plot to assassinate Adolf Hitler in July 1944.

programme.title: I Am Soldier
programme.desc: With the toughest selection process in the British army, does a chef have what it takes to join the S.A.S.?

programme.title: Megan Leavey
programme.desc: A young Marine corporal's unique bond with her combat dog saves many lives during their deployment in Iraq.

programme.title: Abduction
programme.desc: When Nathan discovers the people who raised him are not his parents, he begins to uncover unsettling secrets.

programme.title: A Young Man with High Potential
programme.desc: This shocking, controversial horror thriller sees an uptight man succumb to his inner desires. Piet is a socially awkward, lonely and reclusive student, who catches up on classes online. This changes when he is forced to partner a project with new student Klara. Soon he becomes fixated with her. After his advances are rebuffed, he starts down a dark and despicable path.

programme.title: Come to Daddy
programme.desc: Elijah Wood (The Lord of the Rings) stars in this critically acclaimed, genre-bending horror comedy thatll leave you shocked and in hysterics. After years of no contact, Norval (Wood) visits his estranged father (Stephen McHattie, Watchmen) and quickly discovers he has a shady past. Also starring Michael Smiley (Kill List) and Garfield Wilson (The Man in the High Castle).

programme.title: Escape Room
programme.desc: A mind-bending psychological thriller about a group of friends who find themselves in a sadistic, living nightmare. Six adventurous strangers travel to a mysterious building to experience a game where players compete to solve puzzles to win money. But what starts out as innocent fun soon turns into a suffocating and terrifying game of hell.

programme.title: A Call to Spy
programme.desc: Inspired by incredible true stories. At the beginning of WWII Churchill orders his new spy agency to recruit women as spies to build a resistance. SOEs spymistress Vera Atkins (Stana Katic), recruits Virginia Hall (Sarah Megan Thomas), an ambitious American with a wooden leg and Noor Inayat Khan (Radhika Apte), a Muslim pacifist, who leave an unmistakable legacy in their wake.

programme.title: Only God Forgives
programme.desc: A drug-smuggler in Bangkok's criminal underworld, sees his life get even more complicated when his mother compels him to find who is responsible for his brother's death. Starring Ryan Gosling (2013)

programme.title: Kickboxer: Vengeance
programme.desc: A kickboxer goes on a gruelling mission of revenge to defeat the man who killed his brother. Starring Alain Moussi, Jean Claude Van Damme and Dave Bautista (2016).

programme.title: The Sinister Surrogate
programme.desc: A couple discover that the surrogate mother of their child will stop at nothing to keep the baby. Starring Maeve Quinlan (2018)

programme.title: Twisted Tenant
programme.desc: A woman finds a handsome stranger in her childhood bedroom but discovers that he is hiding a secret past. Starring Lauren Swickard (2018)

programme.title: Love Afloat
programme.desc: Lorelei travels to the Caribbean after inheriting a sailboat from her late uncle.

programme.title: The Seven Year Hitch
programme.desc: Jennifer invites her childhood best friend Kevin to live with her. Seven years later, the friends are still living together, but Jennifer is now engaged. Can Kevin prove he is her true love? (2012)

programme.title: Fashionably In Love
programme.desc: New York playboy Oliver needs to clear up his image by dating Avery a respectable socialite. Will this unluckily pairing turn into anything more? (2022)

programme.title: The Seven Year Hitch
programme.desc: Jennifer invites her childhood best friend Kevin to live with her. Seven years later, the friends are still living together, but Jennifer is now engaged. Can Kevin prove he is her true love? (2012)

programme.title: The Seven Year Hitch
programme.desc: Jennifer invites her childhood best friend Kevin to live with her. Seven years later, the friends are still living together, but Jennifer is now engaged. Can Kevin prove he is her true love? (2012)

programme.title: Righteous Kill
programme.desc: The story begins with highly decorated Detectives Turk and Rooster of the NYPD facing a retirement which neither of them are ready for. Before they can hang up their badges, they are called to investigate the murder of a notorious pimp, who appears to have ties to a case they solved years before. Like the original murder, the victim is a suspected criminal whose body is found accompanied by a four-line poem justifying the killing. When additional crimes take place, it becomes clear the detectives are looking for a serial killer - one who targets criminals who have fallen through the cracks of the judicial system.

programme.title: World's Greatest Dad
programme.desc: World's Greatest Dad is a story about a man who learns that the things you want most may not be the things that make you happy. Robin Williams stars as Lance Clayton, a man who has learned to settle. He dreamed of being a rich and famous writer, but has only managed to make it as a high school poetry teacher. His only son Kyle is an insufferable jackass who won't give his father the time of day. Then, in the wake of a freak accident, Lance suffers the worst tragedy and the greatest opportunity of his life. He is suddenly faced with the possibility of all the fame, fortune and popularity he ever dreamed of, if only he can live with the knowledge of how he got there.

programme.title: My All American
programme.desc: Freddie Steinmark, an underdog on the gridiron, faces the toughest challenge of his life after leading his team to a championship season.

programme.title: The Beaver
programme.desc: Two-time Academy Award winner Jodie Foster directs and co-stars with two-time Academy Award winner Mel Gibson in The Beaver - an emotional story about a man on a journey to re-discover his family and re-start his life. Plagued by his own demons, Walter Black was once a successful toy executive and family man who now suffers from depression. No matter what he tries, Walter can't seem to get himself back on track... until a beaver hand puppet enters his life.

programme.title: Trapped
programme.desc: The parents of an abducted daughter go to unprecedented lengths to get her back unharmed.

programme.title: Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon
programme.desc: A legendary warrior's stolen magic sword becomes the centerpiece of epic, intertwining love stories, set against the breathtaking landscapes of ancient China.

programme.title: Nowhere To Run
programme.desc: Action star Jean-Claude Van Damme is an escaped convict hiding out in a widow's (Rosanna Arquette) farm. When a land developer tries to force Arquette off her land in order to complete a multimillion dollar real estate deal, Van Damme steps in to save the day.

programme.title: Bite the Bullet
programme.desc: Wild west saga of a 700 mile horse race across rugged terrain by nine men and women after big prize money.

programme.title: The Big Picture
programme.desc: Hollywood is hilariously lampooned in this behind-the-scenes look at making it, no matter what. Kevin Bacon stars.

programme.title: The Hollywood Knights
programme.desc: The outrageous antics of a Beverly Hills high school gang on Halloween night, 1965. Starring Tony Danza, Michelle Pfeiffer, Fran Drescher and Robert Wuhl.

programme.title: Jawbreaker
programme.desc: Courtney, Julie, Marcie and Lizz are the best of friends, as well as the most popular and beautiful girls at Reagan High. However, their preeminence is threatened when an innocent birthday prank results in the accidental death of Lizz. What results is a dark, comical Faustian tale of corruption, redemption and makeover madness.

programme.title: 3 Ninjas Knuckle Up
programme.desc: Rocky, Colt and Tum Tum are back in an all new adventure everyone will fall for.

programme.title: Bye Bye Birdie
programme.desc: A rock singer travels to a small Ohio town to make his "farewell" television performance and kiss his biggest fan before he is drafted.

programme.title: Short Term 12
programme.desc: But Grace's own difficult past, and the surprising future that suddenly presents itself, throw her into unforeseen confusion, made all the sharper with the arrival of a new intake at the facility, a gifted but troubled teenage girl with whom Grace has a charged connection. While the subject matter is complex and often dark, Short Term 12 finds truth and humour in unexpected places.

programme.title: The Hummingbird Project
programme.desc: In this modern epic, Kim Nguyen exposes the ruthless edge of our increasingly digital world. Cousins from New York, Vincent (Jesse Eisenberg) and Anton (Alexander Skarsgård) are players in the high-stakes game of High Frequency Trading. Their dream? To build a fiber-optic cable straight line between Kansas and New Jersey, making them millions. Together they push each other and everyone around them to breaking point on their quixotic adventure, while their old boss Eva Torres (Salma Hayek) will stop at nothing to beat them at their own game.

programme.title: The Glass Castle
programme.desc: Chronicling the adventures of an eccentric, resilient and tight-knit family, THE GLASS CASTLE is a remarkable story of unconditional love. Oscar® winner Brie Larson brings Jeannette Walls's best-selling memoir to life as a young woman who, influenced by the joyfully wild nature of her deeply dysfunctional father (Woody Harrelson), found the fiery determination to carve out a successful life on her own terms.

programme.title: Feed
programme.desc: Olivia and Matthew Grey, 18-year-old twins born into a world of privilege and high expectations. There are almost no boundaries between them even their dreams are connected.

programme.title: Mortal
programme.desc: Chronicle meets X-Men meets Thor Mortal is a fantasy adventure epic from the director of Troll Hunter and starring The Fault In Our Star's Nat Wolff. Based on ancient Norse Mythology, a young boy must discover the origins of his extraordinary powers before hell-bent authorities condemn him for an accidental murder. A breath-taking and thrilling origins adventure story about one boy's journey to uncover who, or what, he really is.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Afterlife
programme.desc: In a world ravaged by a virus infection, turning its victims into the Undead, ALICE, continues on her journey to find survivors and lead them to safety. Her deadly battle with the Umbrella Corporation reaches new heights, but Alice gets some unexpected help from an old friend. A new lead that promises a safe haven from the Undead takes them to Los Angeles, but when they arrive the city is overrun by thousands of Undead - and Alice and her comrades are about to step into a deadly trap.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles III: Turtles in Time
programme.desc: The turtles have defeated their nemesis Shredder and are still forced to hide in the depths of the subway system. April brings them gifts to cheer them up and one of them is a time traveling device which takes the turtles and April back to feudal Japan. The turtles must fight to free the village and find a way home. Starring Elias Koteas ("Gattaca," "Shooter"), Paige Turco ("The Game Plan," "Invincible"), and Vivian Wu ("The Pillow Book," "The Last Emperor")

programme.title: Birth of the Dragon
programme.desc: In the world of martial arts, there is one man above all: Bruce Lee. San Francisco, 1965. Young, hungry and looking for an opportunity to make a name for himself, Lee (Philip Ng) challenges legendary Shaolin monk and kung fu master, Wong Jack Man (Yu Xia), to a fight when he hears that he's crossing the Pacific to observe the state of kung fu in America. Their legendary fight would change the history of martial arts forever.

programme.title: Other Ways of Living

programme.title: PRIDE
programme.desc: Follow the story of a young Alaskan woman named Apayauq Reitan, who in 2022 became the first openly transgender musher to compete in the Iditarod, a dog sled race that covers more than 1,000 miles through the Alaskan wilderness.

programme.title: Ocean Guardians
programme.desc: Discover the personal stories of individuals at the forefront of ocean conservation.

programme.title: Cornwall's Climate Stories II
programme.desc: Cornwall faces several impacts from climate change, but this series spotlights local heroes tackling the challenges.

programme.title: Nature Guardians: Watson
programme.desc: Like a crime-fighting superhero of the high seas, Sea Shepherd founder Paul Watson has spent his life sailing the globe to keep our oceans and their inhabitants safe.

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: The Royal Bengal Tiger is in it's most primeval form here in the Sunderbans. `The tangled mangroves along the tributaries of the river Ganga are one of the most fearsome forests of the World. The tigers could kill humans and eat them.

programme.title: From Cubs To Kings
programme.desc: From a miserable existence as a tourist sideshow in Spain to the wild plains of Africa, 'From Cubs to Kings' follows two cubs on their journey to a better future.

programme.title: Slow Down and Enjoy Life
programme.desc: The natural world often moves so fast that we don't even see it, but slow it down the action and a whole new world is revealed.

programme.title: Bucketlist Europe
programme.desc: Europe is a densely packed continent, with some 700 million residents living across 50 countries. It's famed for its ancient cities and civilisations, but is sometimes overlooked when it comes to the natural world. But there's no doubt that the continent is a treasure trove of natural beauty, a mosaic of landscapes each filled with their own unique animal communities. If you were planning a bucket list trip of the natural wonders of Europe, you'd only have to ask yourself one question: where would you start?

programme.title: Coasts
programme.desc: We love our coasts, and so do animals! The corridor of water where the open ocean transitions into coastal habitat is known as the surf zone. The churning forces of the waves clashing with the land make these some of the most food-rich waters on Earth.

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: Elephant human conflict has been going on in India for decades. Only now it has increased because of the shrinking forests and the expanding human habitation. North Bengal with it's fragmented habitat of tea gardens, human habitation and paddy fields is a hot bed of conflict

programme.title: Plants Behaving Badly
programme.sub-title: Plants Behaving Badly: Orchids - Sex and Lies
programme.desc: Orchids produce thousands of seeds, which are so small that they contain no food reserves. They can only germinate with the help of specific fungi in the soil. In the past, this made orchids hard to grow from seed, a problem now solved by hi-tec labs. This means that some of the rarest can be re-introduced to old haunts. These projects are carried out in such secrecy, it's like something from a spy movie.

programme.title: Plants Behaving Badly
programme.sub-title: Plants Behaving Badly: Carnivorous Plants - Murder and Mayhem
programme.desc: Charles Darwin was fascinated by the extraordinary behaviour of carnivorous plants and we now know that he barely knew the half of it. Recently scientists have shown that many more plants are carnivorous than we ever thought. Welcome to the world of killer tomatoes and murderous potatoes.

programme.title: Crazy Creature Costumes
programme.desc: Animals shock us with the most bizarre appearances - some even look like they've been dressing up. But the weird and wonderful shapes and colours of nature are vital to the animals' lives. Sometimes they're disguised to help blend in, other times they are designed to stand out and show off. But whether it's a monkey in make-up or a salamander's toxic stripes, the weird and wonderful outfits enable the creature to thrive.

programme.title: Hoanib
programme.sub-title: The Secret of the Desert Elephants
programme.desc: The Namib, one of the most hostile deserts on Earth. Without a firm survival strategy, no living soul will make it here. Yet, surprisingly, some species have adapted their lifestyles to these extreme conditions: chameleons, beetles, snakes and mammals are all at home here. The film follows a family of desert elephants that has also adapted to this habitat.

programme.title: Red Panda
programme.desc: The Red Panda is undoubtedly one of the most beautiful animals on earth and this is the first ever intimate portrait ever made.

programme.title: Survival of the Fittest in the Alps
programme.desc: The documentary shows the survival strategies of various animal species in the high mountains of the Alps in winter. Despite freezing temperatures and limited food supply, chamois, red deer and snow hares manage to survive the cold months. Latest research reveals the amazing abilities the animals have developed to adapt to the extreme conditions and also how climate change is altering the behaviour of the alpine inhabitants.

programme.title: Zoo Babies: Zoo Babies
programme.desc: We find out about the sweetest and most poignant animal baby stories. Whether on land, under water or in the sky - all of the babies in this series will conquer the hearts of all those watching. We accompany the adventures of the animal babies - lovingly cared for and brought up by their keepers. In the most gripping and informative way, both young and old will discover everything there is to know about Hamburg Zoo's toddlers.

programme.title: Wildlife Nannies: Wildlife Nannies
programme.desc: Raccoon Zorro: 8 week old racoon Zorro is a real handful for Nanny Julia Wiertz. No stone is left unturned on his mischievous adventures. Will Zorro be able to learn how to climb and scavage for food with Julia as a teacher? Storks: Dr. Michael Kaatz has two motherless baby storks at his stork sanctuary. In order to find a new home for Max and Moritz, he is trying to trick a stork family into adopting the orphaned storks. But will the recovered foundlings ever be able to fly in the wild? Zebra Baby et al.: Wildlife keeper Jaco Nell teaches his new assistant Anna de la Roca how to take care of cheetahs, rhinos and zebras on his South African gaming reserve “Kapama”.

programme.title: Wildlife Nannies: Wildlife Nannies
programme.desc: Emus: The two emu babies Candy and Henry have accidentally imprinted on their care taker Matthias Reinschmidt at the “Loro Parque” in Tenerife. Now the two young birds follow Matthias everywhere he goes. But they are now big enough to live in an outdoor enclosure of the park – alongside giant turtles! Will they accept their new home and the fact that Matthias will only come to visit sporadically from now on? Baboon Babies: In Namibia, Corinna Auffing and her husband John Ross Stewart are teaching the three little baboon babies Drekki, Stocki and Beuki everything they need to know in order to become proper baboons. Elephant Limpopo: Elephant Baby Limpopo joins the herd on a South African elephant safari under the guidance of Nanny Paul Coetzee for the first time.

programme.title: Wildlife Nannies: Wildlife Nannies
programme.desc: Pilot Nanny: At the South African “Sondéla Wildlife Center” nanny Petronel Nieuwoudt takes care of animals that have been injured or orphaned because of poaching. Her newest “problem child” is a gnu named Cabrona – will she find a new family for the shy animal? Penguins: Nanny Wolfgang Magnus is responsible for the penguin offspring in Germany's famous bird park in Walsrode. He spends all the time he can with them, makes sure they gain enough weight and even builds them little caves made out of paper-mâché – several times daily!

programme.title: Wildlife Nannies: Wildlife Nannies
programme.desc: Cheetahs & Co.: Dana Vogt has a heart for all African animals, but it is especially the cheetahs that she has fallen in love with. She is returning to the “Harnas Farm” for the third year in a row and is amazed by how much the little babies she raised in her first year have grown. Monkey Annie: Annie is a tiny squirrel monkey that lives in the South African monkey sanctuary “Monkeyland”. Lara Mostert has been raising her so far, but now it is time to say goodbye, as Annie is to go live with other monkeys. But will they get along? Mini Pigs: Tina John has an unusual passion: mini pigs! Two of her cute pig pets are to move to a new farm. Tina is nervous: Will her little friends find a good new home?

programme.title: SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 1, Norway
programme.desc: Across seven rivers, through mountains and forests, 12 strongmen go to toughest places to find out who is strongest Viking in the World and open a new season of Strongman champions league for 2015.
